title: 24 Gift Maker Collection Foil Tags - 12 Gold & 12 Red Christmas Xmas Tags - Assorted Designs
features: 24 Red Foiled Tags of 4 different shapes.
description: Product description 2 Packs of 12 Red Foil Gift Tags and String provided. 4 Shape Designs, 3 Tags of each supplied. Suitable for Christmas, Birthdays, Anniversaries, Valentine's Day and those memorable special occasions. From the Gift Maker Collection. Legal Disclaimer Not suitable for children under 3 due to smaltl parts and choking hazard. This pack contains 24 Red Foil Tags. Not 12 red and 12 gold as advertised.
